description: Fixed mini knowledge base and synthetic cosine scores for Sprint 3 Slice 4 Story 6 (Person 4): exact-term vs hybrid retrieval evaluation. Vector scores are keyed in corpus row order; lexical scores come from the same article text loaded into SQLite. Queries are passed through normalize_query inside search.retrieve(); BM25 uses that normalized string.

articles.question: Medical clinic and nurse station hours
articles.answer: The nurse station is open daily from 8am to 8pm in the main hall.

articles.question: Code Gray internal emergency response
articles.answer: Code Gray means a combative or violent internal situation. Staff will call security and move residents away from the area.

articles.question: MediQuon Field Clinic triage tent
articles.answer: MediQuon triage is in the east parking lot under the white MediQuon canopy. Bring your wristband.

articles.question: Building C North Wing room map
articles.answer: North Wing rooms C-201 through C-240 are on level 2. Follow the blue corridor signs past the elevators.

articles.question: Registration desk wristband pickup
articles.answer: Pick up your wristband at the registration desk in Building A lobby after intake is complete.

articles.question: Mental health counseling and emotional support
articles.answer: Counselors are available in the wellness room daily. Ask for a private conversation if you feel anxious or overwhelmed.

queries.query: where is the MediQuon triage tent
queries.note: Vector favors generic clinic (1); lexical should surface MediQuon (3) so hybrid fixes top ranking.

queries.query: what does Code Gray mean here
queries.note: Procedure phrase is exact in article 2; vector is biased toward generic medical (1).

queries.query: where are rooms in Building C North Wing
queries.note: Location tokens match article 4; synthetic vector still prefers clinic (1).

queries.query: when do I get my wristband at registration
queries.note: Mixed semantic + exact term; vector top is generic medical while wristband/registration text matches 5.

queries.query: I feel anxious and want to talk to a counselor
queries.note: Semantic match on article 6; hybrid should not displace the correct article from rank 1.
Clear semantic winner (1); lexical aligns; vector-only and hybrid should share the same top-1.
